_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: OpenRune Central Server
author: OpenRune
description: OpenRune Central - Kotlin/Ktor backend for game worlds: accounts, sessions, world-link TCP auth, worlds list, jav_config proxy, and activity logs.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash

INSTALL_DIR="/mnt/server"
RAW="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OpenRune/OpenRune-Central-Server/main/deploy/pterodactyl"

cd "${INSTALL_DIR}" 2>/dev/null || {
  echo "[Install] ERROR: cannot cd ${INSTALL_DIR}"
  exit 1
}

if ! command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "[Install] installing curl..."
  apk add --no-cache curl || exit 1
fi

write_start_scripts() {
  cat >start.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

cd /home/container

SERVER_JAR="${SERVER_JAR:-openrune-central-server.jar}"

# shellcheck source=start-modules.sh
source ./start-modules.sh

if [[ ! -f "${SERVER_JAR}" ]]; then
    echo "[Orchestrator] ERROR: JAR not found: ${SERVER_JAR}"
    echo "[Orchestrator] Upload ${SERVER_JAR} manually, or set Central update to Automatic or Notification required."
    exit 1
fi

exec java -Xms128M -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=95.0 ${JAVA_OPTS:-} ${JVM_EXTRA_FLAGS:-} \
    -Duser.dir=/home/container \
    -jar "${SERVER_JAR}"
EOF
  cat >start-modules.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Runs startup modules (logcleaner → cloudflared) before the Java process.
set -euo pipefail

cd /home/container

BLUE='\033[0;34m'
BOLD_BLUE='\033[1;34m'
NC='\033[0m'

header() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}───────────────────────────────────────────────${NC}"
    echo -e "${BOLD_BLUE}[Orchestrator] $1${NC}"
}

enabled() { [[ "${1}" =~ ^(true|1|yes|on)$ ]]; }

jarupdate_enabled() {
    local mode="${OPENRUNE_CENTRAL_UPDATE:-}"
    if [[ -z "${mode}" ]]; then
        if enabled "${JAR_UPDATE_DISABLE:-0}" || ! enabled "${JAR_UPDATE_STATUS:-1}"; then
            return 1
        fi
        return 0
    fi
    case "${mode,,}" in
        disabled|disable|off|0|false|no) return 1 ;;
        *) return 0 ;;
    esac
}

run_module() {
    local name="$1"
    local script="modules/${name}/start.sh"
    if [[ ! -f "${script}" ]]; then
        echo "[Orchestrator] Module '${name}' not found (${script}); skipping."
        return 0
    fi
    if [[ "${name}" == "jarupdate" ]] && ! jarupdate_enabled; then
        echo "[Orchestrator] Central update disabled (OPENRUNE_CENTRAL_UPDATE=disabled); skipping jarupdate."
        return 0
    fi
    header "Running module: ${name}"
    bash "${script}"
}

MODULE_ORDER="${START_MODULES:-autoupdate jarupdate config logcleaner cloudflared}"
for module in ${MODULE_ORDER}; do
    run_module "${module}"
done

header "Starting OpenRune Central (Java)"
EOF
  chmod +x start.sh start-modules.sh
}

fetch() {
  path="$1"
  echo "[Install] GET ${path}"
  mkdir -p "$(dirname "${path}")"
  if curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 120 "${RAW}/${path}" -o "${path}.part"; then
    mv -f "${path}.part" "${path}"
    echo "[Install] ok ${path}"
    return 0
  fi
  rm -f "${path}.part"
  echo "[Install] FAILED ${path}"
  return 1
}

fail() {
  echo "[Install] ERROR: $1"
  exit 1
}

echo "[Install] OpenRune Central"
write_start_scripts

fetch modules/config/start.sh || fail "modules/config/start.sh"
fetch modules/autoupdate/start.sh || fail "modules/autoupdate/start.sh"
fetch modules/logcleaner/start.sh || fail "modules/logcleaner/start.sh"
fetch modules/jarupdate/start.sh || fail "modules/jarupdate/start.sh"
fetch modules/cloudflared/start.sh || fail "modules/cloudflared/start.sh"
chmod +x modules/*/start.sh

fetch autoupdate-files.txt || fail "autoupdate-files.txt"
fetch install.sh || fail "install.sh"
chmod +x install.sh

ARCH=$(uname -m)
case "${ARCH}" in
  x86_64|amd64) CF=amd64 ;;
  aarch64|arm64) CF=arm64 ;;
  *) fail "unsupported arch ${ARCH}" ;;
esac

echo "[Install] GET cloudflared (${CF})"
if curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 300 \
  "https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-${CF}" \
  -o cloudflared.part; then
  mv -f cloudflared.part cloudflared
  chmod +x cloudflared
  echo "[Install] ok cloudflared"
else
  fail "cloudflared download"
fi

echo "[Install] done"

variables.name: Server JAR file
variables.description: Filename of the uploaded Central server JAR in /home/container.

variables.name: JVM Extra Flags
variables.description: Additional JVM flags (e.g. -Xmx512M)

variables.name: Script update
variables.description: Sync deploy/pterodactyl scripts from GitHub main.

variables.name: Central update
variables.description: GitHub Releases JAR (openrune-central-server.jar).

variables.name: Write central-config.yaml
variables.description: Generate central-config.yaml from the variables below on each start (1 = yes, 0 = use uploaded file only).

variables.name: HTTP port
variables.description: Ktor HTTP port (world list, jav_config, admin). Match your public URL / Cloudflare tunnel target.

variables.name: Database host
variables.description: PostgreSQL hostname (used if JDBC URL is empty).

variables.name: Database port
variables.description: PostgreSQL port.

variables.name: Database name
variables.description: PostgreSQL database name.

variables.name: Database user
variables.description: PostgreSQL user.

variables.name: Database password
variables.description: PostgreSQL password. Optional when Database host is 127.0.0.1 (local trust/peer auth).

variables.name: Database pool size
variables.description: Hikari maximum pool size (1–100).

variables.name: JDBC URL (optional)
variables.description: Full JDBC URL override. If set, host/port/name are ignored.

variables.name: Session TTL (ms)
variables.description: Stale session sweep TTL in milliseconds (default 60000 = 1 minute).

variables.name: World-link TCP port
variables.description: World server auth port (0 or false to disable).

variables.name: Jav config revision
variables.description: Remote jav_config revision (jav_local_%d.ws).

variables.name: Jav config overrides
variables.description: One line: separate entries with ; (e.g. title=MyServer;codebase=…;param=25=238).

variables.name: Enable Logcleaner Module
variables.description: Clean logs/tmp from the previous run before starting (1 = on, 0 = off).

variables.name: Enable Cloudflare Tunnel
variables.description: Start cloudflared on boot and enable HTTPS via Cloudflare (0 = off, 1 = on).

variables.name: Cloudflared Tunnel Token
variables.description: Tunnel run token from Cloudflare (Zero Trust → Networks → Tunnels → Install connector).
